## How to Use

When a JIRA ticket mentions a router hostname (e.g., "E2E-P-AGG-01", "DV-L-AGG-03"), look up its management IP from this table. Use the Mgmt IP to connect via `dn-connect-mcp` or SSH.

Note: Customer/production router names (e.g., "L-Agg-303") do NOT match lab hostnames. If the ticket references a production router, the user must provide the management IP directly.
